purpose: Scans for consumers after editing shared files (components, templates, config)
pipeline: PostToolUse hook → reads stdin → path check → grep consumers → emit list

purpose: Detects and logs friction signals from user messages in real-time
pipeline: UserPromptSubmit hook → reads stdin → pattern match → append to friction log

purpose: Detects repeated empty Grep results and fires a circuit-breaker warning
pipeline: PostToolUse hook → reads stdin tool result → tracks empty Greps → warns at 3

purpose: Run Claude Code headless for safe batch operations
scope: Any batch operation that is well-defined and repeatable
pipeline: CLI → claude headless → restricted tools → output file

purpose: Auto-injects Mintlify MDX constraints when user messages involve page/component editing
pipeline: UserPromptSubmit hook → reads stdin user message → keyword match → inject constraints

purpose: Validates MDX files after edit using the server-manager (port 3145)
pipeline: PostToolUse hook → reads stdin → checks if .mdx → hits server-manager → reports

purpose: Backs up substantial user messages to prevent data loss from command typos
pipeline: UserPromptSubmit hook → reads stdin → saves long messages → exits
PostToolUse hook (Bash) -> parse command -> store moves -> dry-run -> systemMessage

purpose: Enforces phase checkpoint verification before allowing work to proceed
pipeline: PostToolUse hook → reads phase-gate.jsonl → emits unverified checkpoints

purpose: Post-tool verification for Claude Code sessions
pipeline: PostToolUseFailure hook → reads stdin → tracks failures → triggers circuit breaker at 3

purpose: Preserves critical session state before context compaction
pipeline: PreCompact hook → reads critical files → builds state summary → injects via systemMessage

purpose: Pre-tool enforcement for Claude Code sessions
pipeline: PreToolUse hook → reads stdin tool input → decision (allow/block/warn)

purpose: Tracks which files Claude reads per session for context-gate enforcement
pipeline: PostToolUse hook (Read) → reads stdin → appends file path to /tmp/claude-reads-{session}

purpose: Registers active sessions and tracks which files each session touches
pipeline: SessionStart hook / PostToolUse hook → writes to /tmp/claude-session-registry
